target_rules: Preserve the source object name exactly unless the source SQL explicitly renames it.
Do not emit PostgreSQL-only casts, dollar quoting, or language clauses.

unsupported_object_types.cursor: Standalone cursor objects are not supported as migratable objects for SQL Server in this tool.
unsupported_object_types.event: PostgreSQL event migration is not supported by this tool.

table: Convert PostgreSQL table syntax to valid SQL Server DDL with compatible data types and defaults.
view: Convert PostgreSQL view syntax to valid SQL Server view syntax.
storedprocedure: Convert PostgreSQL procedure syntax to valid SQL Server CREATE PROCEDURE syntax.
function: Convert PostgreSQL function syntax to valid SQL Server CREATE FUNCTION syntax.
trigger: Convert PostgreSQL trigger semantics to valid SQL Server trigger syntax.
sequence: Convert PostgreSQL sequences to valid SQL Server CREATE SEQUENCE syntax when present.
